functions.name: ValueAnalyticsTrendChart
params:
{
  title,
  data,
  yAxisLabel,
  valueFormatter,
  variant,
  tooltipLabels,
}

callGraph.callee:
Array.from(map.values())
    .sort(
      (a, b) =>
        b.consumedQuantity - a.consumedQuantity ||
        b.amount - a.amount ||
        a.itemId.localeCompare(b.itemId),
    )
    .slice
